title: Grades for every team eliminated from the World Cu...
summary: ESPN evaluates all 47 teams eliminated from the World Cup based on how their performances compared to pretreatment expectations, providing comprehensive grades for each national squad.
content: When the World Cup ends, 47 teams will have been eliminated, and we're grading every one on how their run compared with expectations.

title: Copy of Why every round-of-32 team will, won't win the Wor...
summary: Analysis examines which round-of-32 World Cup teams have realistic chances of winning the tournament based on current form and matchups.

zh.title: 32强球队为何能赢、不能赢世界杯的副本
zh.summary: 分析基于目前状态和对阵情况，检查哪些32强世界杯球队有现实的锦标赛夺冠机会。

title: The story of Christian Pulisic, U.S. stars, a trip...
summary: The U.S. men's team's 2026 World Cup story includes an unexpected human-interest element: Cole Schamber, a golf cart dealership owner from Dana Point, California.
content: When the story of the U.S. men's team at the 2026 World Cup is finally told, there might well be a chapter for Cole Schamber, owner of a golf cart dealership in Dana Point, California.

zh.title: 克里斯蒂安·普利西克的故事、美国球星、一次旅行

title: USMNT must heed World Cup lessons learned in loss ...
summary: Despite a 3-2 loss to Türkiye in group play, USMNT manager Mauricio Pochettino gained valuable insights about his backup players in a match with minimal playoff implications.
content: A late 3-2 defeat to Türkiye will count for little in the grand scheme of things, but USMNT boss Mauricio Pochettino will have learned plenty about his second-string players.

zh.title: 美国队必须吸取世界杯失利中的教训
zh.summary: 尽管在小组赛中以3-2输给土耳其，美国队主教练莫里西奥·波切蒂诺在这场对季后赛影响不大的比赛中获得了关于替补球员的宝贵见解。

title: USMNT player ratings: Turner earns 3/10 as U.S. co...
summary: The U.S. team's strong World Cup start faltered after conceding three goals, with backup goalkeeper Matt Turner earning a 3/10 rating for his performance.
content: The USMNT's hot start finally hit a bump with three goals conceded, with backup keeper Matt Turner bearing blame.

zh.title: 美国队球员评分：特纳获3/10评分
zh.summary: 美国队在失三球后强劲的世界杯开局受挫，替补门将马特·特纳因表现获得3/10的评分。

title: Poch puzzled by 'weird' questions: We 'won group'
summary: USMNT manager Mauricio Pochettino expressed frustration with media questions following the 3-2 loss to Türkiye, insisting the team still won its group.
content: Mauricio Pochettino was combative and seemingly frustrated with the media during his postgame news conference Thursday night, telling reporters after the United States lost to Türkiye 3-2, we still won the group.

zh.title: 波切蒂诺被"奇怪"问题所困惑：我们"赢得小组"

title: Pulisic subs on as Türkiye beats U.S. on last kick...
summary: The U.S. finished group play with an inconsistent performance against Türkiye in a meaningless match, contrasting with their commanding earlier displays.
content: After starting the World Cup with two performances full of incredible verve and vibrancy, the United States finished its group stage with a showing that was erratic and inconsistent in a match that had little meaning.

zh.title: 普利西替补上阵，土耳其在最后一刻击败美国
zh.summary: 美国队在与土耳其的无意义比赛中表现不稳定，与他们早前的出色表现形成鲜明对比，最终完成小组赛。

title: Japan book Brazil WC clash; Sweden also advance
summary: Japan and Sweden both advanced to the World Cup knockout round after a 1-1 draw, with goals from Daizen Maeda and Anthony Elanga canceling each other out.
content: Daizen Maeda gave Japan the lead and Anthony Elanga took it away six minutes later, giving Sweden a 1-1 draw Thursday night that sent both teams to the knockout round of the World Cup.

zh.title: 日本确定对阵巴西，瑞典也晋级
zh.summary: 日本和瑞典在1比1平的比赛后双双晋级世界杯淘汰赛，前田大然和安东尼·埃兰加的进球相互抵消。

title: Ecuador shock Germany, seal spot in WC knockouts
summary: Ecuador pulled off a major upset by defeating Germany 2-1, with Gonzalo Plata scoring the decisive goal to secure a spot in the World Cup knockout stage.
content: Gonzalo Plata poked the ball past Manuel Neuer in the 77th minute, and Ecuador advanced to the knockout stage of the World Cup by rallying for a 2-1 win over Germany on Thursday.

zh.title: 厄瓜多尔爆冷击败德国，晋级世界杯淘汰赛
zh.summary: 厄瓜多尔以2比1击败德国上演大冷门，由冈萨洛·普拉塔打入制胜球，成功晋级世界杯淘汰赛。

title: Faé fires back at Schweinsteiger's 'racist' remark...
summary: Ivory Coast coach Emerse Faé accused former German player Bastian Schweinsteiger of making racist comments about African soccer's playing style.
content: Ivory Coast coach Emerse Faé said he considered 'racist' the comments of former Germany player Bastian Schweinsteiger about African soccer style.

title: Sources: Anderson joins City on club record deal
summary: Manchester City completed a club-record transfer agreement with Nottingham Forest to sign midfielder Elliot Anderson.
content: Manchester City have reached an agreement with Nottingham Forest to sign Elliot Anderson, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：安德森以创纪录转会费加盟曼城

title: USMNT to face Bosnia in World Cup round of 32
summary: The USMNT will face Bosnia-Herzegovina in their World Cup round-of-32 matchup scheduled for Santa Clara, California, marking their entry into knockout stage play.
content: The USMNT's opponent for the first World Cup knockout round has been confirmed, with Bosnia-Herzegovina lying in wait for the co-hosts in Santa Clara, California, on Wednesday.

zh.title: 美国队在世界杯32强赛中将对阵波黑

title: Why Vrancken marks fresh start at data-driven Hearts
summary: Belgian coach Wouter Vrancken's appointment at Hearts reinforces the Scottish club's strategic commitment to data-driven decision-making in player management.
content: As Belgian head coach Wouter Vranckin takes charge at Hearts, it marks a strengthening of the club's data-driven vision, writes Thomas Duncan.

zh.title: 弗兰肯标志着数据驱动Hearts的新开始
zh.summary: 比利时教练沃特·弗兰肯在Hearts的任命强化了这家苏格兰俱乐部在球员管理中数据驱动决策的战略承诺。

title: Hearts' Braga plays down transfer talk - gossip
summary: Hearts striker Braga dismissed speculation about potential transfers to French clubs, reiterating his focus on Champions League qualifying matches.
content: Hearts striker says sole focus is on Champions League qualifying despite links to France as Celtic are set to end long negotiations with coaching staff...

zh.title: Hearts的Braga淡化转会传言
zh.summary: Hearts前锋Braga驳斥了关于转会到法国俱乐部的传言，重申了他对欧冠预选赛的关注。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 19
summary: An interactive quiz challenges readers to identify a World Cup player using minimal clues in a guess-the-star format.
content: Will you get today's World Cup player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯球星19号
zh.summary: 一个互动测验通过最少的线索挑战读者识别一名世界杯球员，采用猜星游戏的形式。

title: 'Oh my word!' - Elanga 'stunner' draws Sweden level
summary: Anthony Elanga's curling goal from the edge of the area equalized Sweden against Japan in their FIFA World Cup Group F match. The dramatic finish highlights Sweden's ability to fight back in the group stage competition.
content: Anthony Elanga scores a brilliant curling effort from the edge of the area to draw Sweden level with Japan in their FIFA World Cup Group F match at Dallas Stadium.

zh.title: '天哪！'- 埃兰加"神级"远射为瑞典扳平
zh.summary: 埃兰加在禁区边缘的弧线球帮助瑞典在国际足联世界杯F组对阵日本的比赛中扳平。这个戏剧性的进球突出了瑞典在小组赛中的反击能力。

title: Beccacece goes from brink to World Cup history with Ecuador
summary: Ecuador coach Sebastian Beccacece's job appeared in jeopardy during their match against Germany, but guided his team to qualify for the World Cup knockout stages. His remarkable turnaround from near-dismissal to achieving World Cup history represents a coaching redemption story.
content: Sebastian Beccacece was on the verge of losing his job as Ecuador head coach as the clock ticked down against Germany - now he has a last-32 match to look forward to.

zh.title: 贝卡塞塞与厄瓜多尔从生死边缘创造世界杯历史
zh.summary: 厄瓜多尔主教练塞巴斯蒂安·贝卡塞塞在与德国的比赛中面临下课危机，但最终带领球队进入世界杯淘汰赛。他从濒临解雇到创造世界杯历史的非凡逆转代表了一个执教救赎故事。

title: 'We could call it racist' - Ivory Coast boss sad at Schweinsteiger comments
summary: Ivory Coast manager Emerse Fae criticized ex-Germany midfielder Bastian Schweinsteiger's characterization of their playing style as "wild," suggesting the comments carry racial undertones. The dispute highlights broader tensions surrounding commentary on African teams' playing styles.
content: Ivory Coast boss Emerse Fae says comments from ex-Germany midfielder Bastian Schweinsteiger about their "wild" playing style could be considered racist.

zh.title: '这可以称为种族歧视'- 象牙海岸主帅对施魏因施泰格言论感到失望
zh.summary: 象牙海岸主教练埃默斯·法埃批评前德国中场球员巴斯蒂安·施魏因施泰格将他们的比赛风格描述为"野蛮"，暗示这些评论带有种族色彩。这场争议突显了围绕对非洲球队比赛风格评论的更广泛紧张关系。
